reviews.comment:
YPF ACA sin dudar por la confiabilidad de la marca cargue nafta aqui. Me atendieron muy bien. Y estan atentos a lo que se necesite. Tienen un facebook de la estacion en la que dan mucha buena informacion sobre estados de rutas y otras informaciones. SIrve mucho.

(Translated by Google)
I chose YPF ACA without hesitation because of the brand's reliability. The service was excellent, and they were very attentive to my needs. They have a Facebook page for the station that provides great information about road conditions and other details. It's very helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3NW9uOVBREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena Opción para el Verano, se puede acampar cerca del centro, con buenas comodidades y a un precio razonable. Nosotros lo usamos para el final de un gran recorrida y hacer un poco de vida en el centro y nos resulto genial

(Translated by Google)
A great option for summer, you can camp near the center, with good amenities and at a reasonable price. We used it at the end of a long trip to enjoy some time in the center, and it was fantastic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBZ3UzM1B3EAE

reviews.comment:
Todo muy limpio..ordenado...y seguridad. Lastima que no dan factura autorizada por la AFIP...

(Translated by Google)
Everything was very clean, tidy, and safe. It's a shame they don't provide an invoice authorized by the AFIP (Argentine Federal Tax Authority).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdWFmajVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Abierto las 24 hrs. Débito, crédito, compresor de aire para las ruedas del auto. ServiClub. Lo único que está muy lleno siempre

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Open 24 hours. Debit and credit cards accepted. Air compressor for car tires. ServiClub. The only downside is that it's always very crowded.
